# Best Test Plants to Buy Online

Looking for the best test plants? This guide covers everything you need to know about buying test plants online.

## Why Buy Test Plants Online

Online nurseries offer better prices and more variety than local garden centers for test plants.

## Top Test Plant Varieties

Here are the best test plant varieties to consider:

- [Test Hydrangea](/plants/test-hydrangea) — A classic choice
- [Test Maple](/plants/test-maple) — Beautiful fall color

## When to Buy Test Plants

The best time to buy test plants is during fall sales when nurseries discount remaining inventory.
